body.title: audit: no-sqlite-imports — exempt Calibre external-DB read in learner.py
body.result: Added tools/learner.py to LEGITIMATE_EXTERNAL in audit_check_sqlite_imports.py — reads Calibre's external metadata.db, not Igor's own data.
body.description:
Day-close audit 2026-04-23 found wild_igor/igor/tools/learner.py:1657 imports sqlite3 — but it's reading Calibre's metadata.db (Calibre is a third-party app that uses SQLite as its native format; we're consuming it, not adopting it). Update audit check pattern or exempt this single line. Acked until 2026-04-30 to avoid noise; resolve before then.

**Affected files:** lab/claudecode/audit_runner.py or audit check definition.
**Test plan:** after fix, audit_runner --drain shows no-sqlite-imports PASS without ack.
